finding: An explicit request to write ATM friction into the backlog and audit a completed governance plan was classified as unknown free-text guidance and then recommended `create-atom`, bypassing the semantically exact backlog skill route.
expectedBehavior: Prompts containing explicit ATM backlog/bug/optimization-record intent should route directly to the canonical backlog workflow, while plan-completion audits should route to closeout/review guidance. They must not default to atom creation merely because no legacy or upgrade evidence was detected.
evidenceOrRepro: On 2026-07-19, `node atm.mjs next --prompt "...回寫 backlog...重新盤點完成計畫書後的缺口..." --json` returned prompt-guidance-required. `node atm.mjs guide --goal ... --json` returned matchedIntent=unknown and required orient/start/next. `node atm.mjs start --goal ... --json` then recommended create-atom with confidence 0.72.
followUp: Add backlog, bug-record, optimization-record, completed-plan-audit, and closeout-review intents to the deterministic lexicon and route them to repo-local skills/playbooks. Add Traditional Chinese prompt fixtures and assert that no atom-creation route is returned.
